Row.Text: A Granary Upgrade is an upgrade to the default Granary, adding more [ICON_FOOD] food and [ICON_PRODUCTION] production to your city. A Granary must be in the city before a Granary Upgrade.
A Granary Upgrade is an upgrade to the default Granary, adding more [ICON_FOOD] food and [ICON_PRODUCTION] production to your city. A Granary must be in the city before a Granary Upgrade.
A Granary Upgrade is an upgrade to the default Granary, adding more [ICON_FOOD] food and [ICON_PRODUCTION] production to your city. A Granary must be in the city before a Granary Upgrade.
